title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.060 - Term of appointee to fill vacancy
text:
172.060.  Term of appointee to fill vacancy. — All appointments to fill vacancies, except such as may be made to fill out unexpired terms, shall be for the term of six years, and until the successors of such appointees shall be appointed and qualified.
(RSMo 1939 § 10788) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9631; 1919 § 11528; 1909 § 11102
